skills.name: link-headers
skills.description: Advertise machine-readable resources via HTTP Link response headers per RFC 8288 and RFC 9727.

skills.name: content-signals
skills.description: Declare AI content usage preferences (ai-train, search, ai-input) in robots.txt.

skills.name: api-catalog
skills.description: Publish an API catalog at /.well-known/api-catalog per RFC 9727, using the linkset+json format.

skills.name: oauth-discovery
skills.description: Publish OAuth 2.0 or OIDC discovery metadata so agents can discover authentication endpoints.

skills.name: oauth-protected-resource
skills.description: Publish OAuth 2.0 protected resource metadata per RFC 9728 so agents know which authorization servers govern this resource.

skills.name: mcp-server-card
skills.description: Publish an MCP server card at /.well-known/mcp/server-card.json so agents can discover this site as an MCP-compatible surface.

skills.name: agent-skills
skills.description: Publish an agent skills discovery index at /.well-known/agent-skills/index.json per the Cloudflare Agent Skills Discovery RFC v0.2.0.

skills.name: webmcp
skills.description: Expose site tools to in-browser AI agents via the WebMCP navigator.modelContext.registerTool() API.
